feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to inspect memory usage in Cloud Integration?
entry.content:
Hi community,

According to the document, we can inspect system memory usage via the Inspect > Memory app. 

In the application, "Maximum Message Size" is shown in the right axis. This number indicates the messeage size, and not memory consumption over a given time period. Although Memory Exhaustions are displayed as a red line, we have no way to check the actual memory consumption unless memory is exhausted. 

Is there any way we can check the actual memory consumption in Cloud Integration?

entry.title: SAP Free tier limitations for Integration suite
entry.content:
Hi,

Referring to the SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2903776.

Need few information's regarding the Free Tier Service Plan for SAP Cloud Integration.

1. How many interfaces can be developed in the Free Tier Service Plan?

2. Does the Free Tier support Best Effort Communication mode (Synchronous Communication)?

3. What is the message volume that is permitted in the free tier service plan?

4. What are the other limitations in using the free tier service plan ?

Regards,

Senthil

entry.title: custom headers are not working in monitoring with wildcard charcters in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement to store the salesforce ID values for each Salesorg, I have used addCustomHeaders function to store the values.

Since i get many records from salesforce all the ID values are stroed in CSV, during message monitoring i am unable to retrieve the message based on single ID value.

I tried giving * after the ID value, but still it was not showing the message with this search .
if i give the entire value i am able to see the message

can you help me how i could search with one ID if i have many ID values stored in custom header


Regards,
Saikumar

entry.title: Sender soap adapter not accepting "Encoding: UTF-8" for request-reply process.
entry.content:
Hi,
I have one interface which is connected Unifier to S4Hana. So, I am using SOAP to XI adapter. 
It's a request-reply mode, I need to send actual error message to sender system but from s4hana I am getting Encoding: UTF-8 message in the body that includes

Encoding: UTF-8
--uuid:0816c727-db39-4f8c-a05d-379f97a756b4 Content-Type: text/xml; charset=UTF-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-ID: <root.message@cxf.apache.org>
XML body
--uuid:0816c727-db39-4f8c-a05d-379f97a756b4--
So, because of the Encoding message source SOAP adapter not allowing the message to send sender side

Can anyone please give any suggestion to overcome this issue.

entry.title: How to access "Log Content" properties in content modifier.
entry.content:
I want to get "ErrorDetail" log content property from monitor to integration flow content modifier you can see below I have highlighted in red.

I have tried multiple ways to get this property like ${property.ErrorDetail}, ${exchangeProperty.ErrorDetail} but nothing has worked.
Can anyone please give any suggestions.

entry.title: Getting 401 unauthorized error while trying to post using HTTP and AS2 connection from partner end
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have been encountering 401 unauthorized error while testing from partner end for HTTP and AS2 connection.

I have used the basic authentication for sender AS2 and HTTP with necessary roles assigned. Valid Certificates were updated at both ends as well.

Can anyone provide me the possible reasons for 401 error and solutions for the same?

Note - The testing when performed with same credentials using postman was successful.

 

Thank you,

Aditya

entry.title: PDF Payload logging in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have got a requirement to log the PDF payload at the time of exception. I have tried the below script but the payload that got logged was not in PDF format but in .txt format.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
 
def Message processData(Message message)
{
def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
 
if(messageLog != null)
{
messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Payload", body, "application/pdf");
}
 
return message;
}
 
Can anyone please provide a solution to this issue.
 
Thank You,
Aditya

entry.title: CPI Starter Mission - Unable to identify proxy for host
entry.content:
Following the starter mission at 

Request Product Details with an Integration Scenario | SAP Tutorials

And when it comes to test the API, I get a 404 : 

{
  "fault": {
    "faultstring": "Unable to identify proxy for host: default and url: /products/details",
    "detail": {
      "errorcode": "messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound"
    }
  }
}

As far as I can tell, everything is deployed, saved, active etc.

My iFlow is at
https://********btrial.integrationsuite-trial.cfapps.ap21.hana.ondemand.com/shell/design/contentpackage/ZPDTrial/integrationflows/Trial2 Suite

I've seen a few other posts to the same effect, but  no useful responses, other than just "try again" which I've done to no avail...

Definitely echo other posters saying that this puts them off CPI ! Any help gratefully received!

entry.title: Local Integration Process Clarification
entry.content:
Dear All,

If we have a flow like below.

Main Integration Process (MIP)  -->  Local Integration Process 1 (LIP1)  --> LIP2

If I set any header in a groovy in LIP2 will this be available in LIP1 and MIP? My understanding is the headers are global in scope and all steps in an iFlow should be able to read and set them. I tried but LIP2 headers are not visible in LIP1. I also tried to define them in LIP1 first and set them in LIP2 but that also didn't help to read them in LIP1/MIP.

Also, what about the exception handling in LIP2 and LIP1? What is the best practice here? Is there any limitation if we have nested processes like this and is there any limit on them?

entry.title: Currency Conversion using Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi all. Today I will explain the use case of currency conversion that I have made using Integration Suite. Below I have attached the image of the Integration Flow that I have created:

In the Currency Parameter setting, we have set the 3 parameters : one for storing the currency in which we will insert our amount (say USD), second one for storing the target currency (INR), and the third one is for storing the amount which we want to convert to the target currency. Also, we set our APIKey here. Next we Request Reply to an api, say fastFOREX, for fetching the base currency and the target currency/currencies rate(s). Then we use the script Amount conversion to convert the given amount to target currency amount. Then we formulate our final message in Payload Creation that we want to be sent to the target mail ids using mail adapter.

Here's a sample mail that one will get after deploying it:

If you want to change the currencies you can do the same by changing the toCurrency and fromCurrency properties in the 'Currency Parameter setting' Content Modifier. 

Hope you like it.

#btp cpi

entry.title: Unable to login with SQL User with SQL authentication in CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on SAP CPI where i can see that login failed for the user.

Steps done.

User in SQL is created with SQL authentication and also having enabled to login with both SQL and windows authentication.

Able to login in SQL server but not in CPI with same details when provided in JDBC data source.

Provided correct Driver latest version 12.4 (Tried other versions also)  and also with correct JDBC URL

Tried in multiple ways but it is showing the same error as below 

Login failed for user 'cpi_user_clean'. 

#SAP CPI

entry.title: Integration of SAP FSM with S/4HANA and C4C via CPI for Equipment Creation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to integrate SAP Field Service Management (FSM) with SAP S/4HANA and SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) systems using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) as the middleware.

Requirement:
When an Equipment is created in SAP FSM, the same equipment should automatically be created in both S/4HANA and C4C systems.

Help Required:
How to configure the communication arrangement in SAP FSM to trigger the Equipment creation event to CPI?
Are there any standard APIs in FSM that we need to configure to send Equipment creation data to CPI?
Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Facing issue in SAP CPI trial version
entry.content: Why am I unable to create artifacts in a package in my newly created trial version? Whenever I try to create an integration flow, it asks for details, but after clicking "Add and Open in Editor," it just keeps loading and returns me to the same screen for entering details. How can I fix this issue?

entry.title: Is the Cloud Connector feature available for Kafka System with SAP Integration Suite ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm exploring integration options for Kafka System using SAP Integration Suite. Can anyone confirm if the cloud connector feature is available for connecting Kafka On-Premise with SAP Integration Suite using Kafka adapter. If so, could you share official documentation links.

Thank you in advance for your insights!

entry.title: How to Integrate SAP Ariba with Third-Party Applications – Standard APIs
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to integrate SAP Ariba (Buyer module) with third-party applications (non-SAP). I would like to know:

  • Are there any standard APIs provided by SAP Ariba for such integrations?

  • If yes, could you please share the list of those APIs or relevant documentation?

  • Is there any recommended approach or best practice for integrating Ariba with external systems?

I’m particularly looking for direct integration options (not via SAP S/4HANA or middleware) if available.

Any guidance or reference to API documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!
Best regards,
Satheesh Kumar.

entry.title: Error when opening Iflow in trial account
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting this error when opening iflow in trial account.

Should we create incident with sap even for trial account issue?

Error while loading the details of the integration flow. Try opening the artifact again. If the issue persists, report the incident to SAP

entry.title: What SAP roles are required for an user to access /sap/xi/engine from CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have been migration our PO interfaces to CPI and we are using Basic authentication to connect with SAP systems.

While migrating proxy interfaces we are facing Authorization issues. The user we are using for all other communications is giving error '401- Unauthorized' when tried to access /sap/xi/engine.

What roles are required here? what options are available?

entry.title: how to extract a portion of the string from the given string
entry.content:
Hi 

Please help me that how can I extract portion of a string from the main string.

For example my input string: hello_world_howareyou.

We want to extract the word "world" but it is not fixed length. The substring is not working here.

Is there any other built-in  function.

Please help me on this.

Thanks

entry.title: How to check the particular field value in the API response and do mapping
entry.content: After doing message mapping, the output value (XYZ) of a particular field (user) should match with the field(group) value (xyz) in the output response of an API. How to find the corresponding record from the API response and map the "id" of that record to this another field.

entry.title: IDOC xsd import giving error in message mapping in SAP CPI iflow
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I am trying to upload the IDOC xsd (from PO ->IDOC ->xsd) but i am getting the error on attributes and also on idoc control segment field
Reference - IDOC xsd import error.png
 
I then came across the below post
CPI Message Mapping XSD Error
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/cpi-message-mapping-xsd-error/qaq-p/12048997
 
I tried to follow the steps as suggested -
Downloaded the XML Schema at http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd and uploaded it as a resource to the iflow
the IDOC xsd does not have any reference and no import 
But tried it anyways which i think is the wrong location anyways and it gave error as expected -<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" schemaLocation="xml.xsd"/>
 
I have searched and i am unable to find why an IDOC xsd generated from PO is not getting uploaded correctly
I can view it correctly and the xsd is valid
 
Please help me as i need to be able to upload the xsd for my message mapping
